# Commits whose subject line matches any of these regexes are skipped.
# Python re.search semantics, case-insensitive. One regex per line.

^Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
^Translation updated by Weblate
^chore:\s*updated build images
^chore:\s*Sonar Cloud version bump
^Bump version to
^version bump to
^Bump to
# We track our own version/release cadence; ignore upstream version bumps.

# These two we already fixed our own way:
^Bump dessant
^Skip proxy tests on MacOsX

# Movie/series-domain features (not bug fixes) we shouldn't auto-pull
^New: Simkl
^New: Trakt
^Anime
